title: You login
description: Login to your account to get started.

title: Go to settings
description: Go to your settings to access your profile.

title: Go to profile
description: Navigate to your profile to access your invite code.

title: Get your invite code
description: Opt-in to get your invite code. (If you don't see this option your account does not have access to invite codes for now.)

title: Copy your invite code
description: Press the copy button to copy your invite code

title: Share your invite code
description: Share your invite code to your friends and family via messages or emails.

title: Your friend uses your invite code
description: Your friends and family use your invite code while setting up their accounts.

title: They successfully setup their accounts
description: Once their accounts are successfully setup, you are credited with an invite.

title: Progress is shown on your profile
description: You can view how many friends you've invited on your profile.

title: Once enough friends are invited
description: Check your profile to see if enough friends have been invited.

title: Claim your refund
description: After the wait period, claim your account refund.

title: We receive the request
description: Once your claim receives approval your refund will be processed. (within 2-3 business days)

title: You'll be notified
description: You'll be notified once your refund gets approved and paid.
